steps.assistant_text: RSP-request submitter, 58.3%->exact. (1) if(0){a1=0;} dead param-kill removes the sw a1 home spill; (2) fp+offset INLINED in the call expr (naming promoted t9/t8 to candidates); (3) obj load after the req stores; (4) three scalar volatile int pads -> frame -0x40/req@0x2C; (5) req.count=14; req.buf_ptr=&req.buf; ON ONE LINE (same-line as1 tie-break) flips the li/addiu setup order.
